title: Replace flash_attention_2 with sdpa on NPU
problem_description: Many HuggingFace models default to attn_implementation='flash_attention_2' when CUDA is available. flash-attn is a CUDA-only library (depends on nvidia-cuda-* packages) and cannot be installed on NPU. Passing flash_attention_2 to model loading on NPU either crashes with ImportError or silently degrades to a slower fallback, wasting inference time and degrading reproducibility.
rough_fix_approach: Explicitly set attn_implementation='sdpa' when loading the model via from_pretrained() on NPU. Torch's scaled dot-product attention (SDPA) is NPU-accelerated via torch_npu and provides comparable performance to flash attention on Ascend hardware. Also exclude flash-attn and all nvidia-cuda-* packages from the venv dependency installation.

involved_code_files.role: Entry inference script — model loading with attn_implementation parameter

reasoning: flash-attn is CUDA-only and present in ~40% of HuggingFace-based LLM projects as a hardcoded dependency. The SDPA fallback is a one-line mechanical change (attn_implementation='sdpa') that works universally across all HF model architectures on NPU. This is among the highest-value rules because it silently degrades performance if not caught — the model loads but uses slow eager attention instead of optimized SDPA on NPU.
